allow: Bash(python -c "from docx import Document; d=Document\(r'C:/Users/yobha/Downloads/eQOURSE_Samples_Section_Update_AI_Data.docx'\); [print\(p.text\) for p in d.paragraphs]")

PowerShell(Copy-Item "C:\\Users\\yobha\\Downloads\\eQOURSE_EdTech_Samples_ALL_17_Pages_Content.docx" "$env:TEMP\\edtech_samples.docx" -Force; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("$env:TEMP\\edtech_samples.docx"\); $e = $z.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "word/document.xml" }; $s = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($e.Open\(\)\); $xml = $s.ReadToEnd\(\); $s.Close\(\); $z.Dispose\(\); $text = [regex]::Replace\($xml, '</w:p>', "`n"\); $text = [regex]::Replace\($text, '<[^>]+>', ''\); [System.Web.HttpUtility]::HtmlDecode\($text\) 2>$null; if \(-not $?\) { $text })
